description_long: This community center complex features a mix of multi-story and single-story buildings arranged around landscaped courtyards and tree-lined walkways. The main structure is a large, rectangular, modern building with a flat roof, extensive window bands, and a brick facade, complemented by several smaller auxiliary buildings with white and red exteriors. The grounds include green lawns, parking lots with marked spaces, and a variety of trees, including some with purple foliage, providing a welcoming and open atmosphere. Outdoor seating areas, pathways, and garden plots are visible, suggesting spaces for social gatherings and recreational activities. The overall layout is organized and accessible, with clear separation between vehicular and pedestrian zones. The design emphasizes community engagement, functionality, and integration with the surrounding urban environment.
description: A modern, multi-building community center complex with brick and white facades, landscaped courtyards, parking lots, and tree-lined walkways.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the rear and side of the main brick building, adjacent to a large parking lot and landscaped areas with trees and pathways.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the tall main building, central courtyard, and the arrangement of smaller auxiliary buildings, with visible parking and tree-lined streets.
description_view_2: View 2 presents a frontal perspective of the main building, flanked by smaller structures, with the parking lot and green spaces in the foreground.
description_view_3: View 3 displays the opposite side of the complex, focusing on the main building's side facade, additional green spaces, and the layout of the surrounding grounds.
attribute_entrance_design: Multiple entrances are visible, including large glass doors at the base of the main building and smaller doorways on auxiliary structures. Entrances are wide and appear accessible, with some featuring overhangs or canopies. The main entrance is integrated into the brick facade and is accessible from the central courtyard.
attribute_architectural_style: Contemporary with Modernist influences, characterized by flat roofs, clean lines, large windows, and a mix of brick and concrete facades.
